[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000100 1
1 11000101 4
2 10100110 4
3 00000000 a
4 10011111 6
5 01011111 6
6 00110011 4
7 01000010 2
